headline: Amgen (AMGN) Stock Weighs Strong Run Against Mixed Valuation Signals
summary: If you are wondering whether Amgen stock still offers value at current levels, this article walks through what the numbers are actually saying about the price you see on screen. Amgen shares last closed at US$360.55, with returns of 3.9% over the past week, 7.1% over the past month, 10.0% year to date, 27.8% over one year, 75.7% over three years, and 73.2% over five years. This gives investors plenty of price history to weigh against today’s valuation. Recent attention on Amgen has been...
